candidates.why: Explicit D&A row exists separately from the selected COGS row 'Direct Costs Related to Revenue', but nothing indicates it is COGS-specific or tied to direct costs.
Separate operating line, but not identified as related to cost of sales/direct costs; also includes impairment so bucket attribution to COGS is not supported.
Appears to be a blank header rather than a numeric summary row, so it should not be selected.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost-of-revenue D&A row is shown. The visible D&A lines are separate operating lines without COGS attribution, so conservatively do not add any row to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line at the same level as the selected overhead component rows 'Staff Costs' and 'Other external expenses'; since those selected rows explicitly excluded D&A, this depreciation appears to sit outside them and should be added separately.

Separate operating line alongside the selected overhead component rows, with no dedicated R&D row visible. It appears outside the selected XSGA component bucket and should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in staff/external expenses.
Looks like a section header with no values, not a usable summary row.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket consists only of 'Staff Costs' and 'Other external expenses'. The D&A rows appear as separate same-level operating expenses, so they should be added separately to avoid understating operating overhead. The blank 'Depreciation / Amortization' row is not used because it appears to be a header, not a numeric summary.
